reasoning: The skeleton has been tried for 4 iterations with scores of -372.2, -352.5, -446.2, -460.7, episode lengths consistently around 107-117, and per-step rewards around -3.1 to -4.3. The agent never survives past 200 steps. The skeleton is fundamentally broken: (1) smoothness_penalty is undirected (penalizes ALL change, encouraging no movement), (2) movement_reward uses abs_diff which can be negative and is too weak, (3) ground_contact uses info key that may not exist, (4) no stability signal for angle/angular velocity. Scores are flat/declining with no improvement trend across 4 iterations. A rebuild is warranted with a simpler, more robust design: survival bonus, angle stability, gentle movement encouragement, and action cost.
